message:
Command `
# Find all module instantiations in the wrapper
grep -E "^\s+\w+ (u_|i_|inst_|\w+_inst)" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u

echo "=== compute_ss top-level ==="
head -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_compute_ss.v 2>/dev/null || \
head -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v 2>/dev/null

echo "=== wrapper instantiation search ==="
grep -n "^\s*mspm33\|^\s*compute_ss\|u_compute\|u_core" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -20` executed with exit code 0.
